mapper.insert: insert into work_order_resource(order_no, resource_type, resource_id, resource_name, resource_info, match_method, created_at) values (#{orderNo}, #{resourceType}, #{resourceId}, #{resourceName}, #{resourceInfo}, #{matchMethod}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select id, order_no, resource_type, resource_id, resource_name, resource_info, match_method, created_at from work_order_resource where id = #{id}
select id, order_no, resource_type, resource_id, resource_name, resource_info, match_method, created_at from work_order_resource where order_no = #{orderNo}
select id, order_no, resource_type, resource_id, resource_name, resource_info, match_method, created_at from work_order_resource where resource_type = #{resourceType}
select count(1) from work_order_resource where order_no = #{orderNo}
